page: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 44 physical cores and 88 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 105 MB of L3 cache and 3892.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 44.23 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is provided via an 8192 GB local disk, and the instance supports Premium Storage.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier performance across multiple categories. The memory subsystem achieves top-tier read-only large block bandwidth of 419.61 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth of 181.06 GB/sec. CPU performance is highlighted by top-tier Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores, alongside a top-tier Passmark CPU score. The processor's support for Advanced Vector Extensions and Advanced Matrix Extensions assists in cryptographic and mathematical operations, as evidenced by top-tier Passmark CPU extended instructions and encryption test results.

This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive and data-heavy workloads. The combination of 3.9 TB of RAM, 8 TB of local storage, and high database operations performance makes this server highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, and enterprise resource planning systems. It also supports strong prompt processing speeds for large language model inference. The high resource density of memory and local storage relative to the 88 vCPUs provides a specialized, cost-efficient architecture for workloads that would otherwise be memory-constrained on standard compute instances.
description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor. Operating at 4.0 GHz, the server provides 44 physical cores, 88 vCPUs, and 105 MB of L3 cache. It features an extensive memory capacity of 3892.0 GB and includes 8192 GB of local storage. Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for memory bandwidth, Geekbench multi-core performance, and Passmark database operations. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX for accelerated mathematical operations. This configuration is highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications requiring massive RAM capacity and high-speed local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 88 vCPUs, 3892 GB RAM, and 8192 GB local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_4_v3 is an 88-vCPU memory-optimized server with 3.9 TB RAM and 8 TB local storage for enterprise database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized server featuring massive RAM, dedicated Intel Xeon processing, and high-speed local storage for enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 44 physical cores and 88 vCPUs at 4.0 GHz
Massive memory capacity of 3892.0 GB providing 44.23 GB of RAM per core
8192 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory bandwidth and database operations performance in benchmark testing
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for accelerated mathematical workloads
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications
